options.content:
| Design Parameter | Current Value | KPI Impact |
|---|---:|---|
| Vehicle Weight | ${vehicleWeightKg} kg | Payload / Utilization / Energy |
| Floor Height | ${floorHeightMm} mm | Accessibility / Loading / Conversion |
| Refill Time | ${refillTimeMin} min | Uptime / Fleet Availability |
| Berth Count | ${berthCount} | Queue / Turnaround |
| H2 Supply | ${h2SupplyKgDay} kg/day | Energy Margin / Dispatch Authorization |

| KPI | Current State | Direction |
|---|---:|---|
| Payload Capacity | 3,200 kg | Vehicle weight sensitive |
| Utilization Rate | 85% | Payload / queue sensitive |
| Fleet Availability | 92% | Refill time sensitive |
| Dispatch Success | 94% | Node / energy sensitive |
| Daily Trips | 1,560 trips | Utilization linked |
| Contribution | 12.4 M JPY/day | Trips and cost linked |
| Federation State | HOLD | Threshold linked |

```text
Vehicle Weight ${vehicleWeightKg} kg
→ Payload Capacity 3,200 kg
→ Utilization Rate 85%
→ Daily Trips 1,560
→ Contribution 12.4 M JPY/day
→ Federation State HOLD
```

```text
Refill Time ${refillTimeMin} min
→ Fleet Availability 92%
→ Dispatch Success 94%
→ ETA Continuity stable
```

```text
Berth Count ${berthCount}
→ Queue controlled
→ Turnaround continuity maintained
```

| Design Change | Visible KPI Effect |
|---|---|
| Vehicle Weight ↑ | Payload ↓ / Utilization ↓ |
| Floor Height ↑ | Accessibility ↓ / Conversion ↓ |
| Refill Time ↑ | Uptime ↓ / Fleet Availability ↓ |
| Berth Count ↓ | Queue ↑ / Turnaround ↓ |
| H2 Supply ↓ | Energy Margin ↓ / HOLD or STOP |

| Shown | Hidden |
|---|---|
| KPI state | Internal propagation equations |
| Operational continuity | Vehicle-to-PL formulas |
| Design assumption values | IRR calculation logic |
| Federation state | Detailed threshold ownership |
| Synchronization status | Internal governance model |
